zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Booth於1392年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾巴頓時，她的父親John Boothe of Barton, Esq.39歲，母親Lady Joanna Trafford34歲。她於大約1433年與Robert De Clifton在英國諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1470年9月9日在英國諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓享年78歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Booth于1392年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾巴頓时，她的父亲John Boothe of Barton, Esq.39岁，母亲Lady Joanna Trafford34岁。她于大约1433年与Robert De Clifton在英国諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1470年9月9日在英国諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓享年78岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓。

nameMeanings.name: Booth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): topographic or occupational name from Middle English bothe (Old Danish bōth) ‘temporary shelter, such as a covered market stall or a cattle-herdsman's hut’. The latter sense was predominant in the Pennines of Lancashire and Yorkshire, where there were many cattle farms or vaccaries, and whose subdivisions were known as ‘booths’. The principal meaning of the surname there was therefore probably ‘cattle herdsman’, ‘man in charge of a vaccary’, and thus identical with Boothman . Elsewhere it may have denoted a shopkeeper who owned a temporary market stall, but no evidence has been found to confirm this use of the surname. In the British Isles the surname is still more common in northern England, where Scandinavian influence was more marked, and in Scotland, where the word was borrowed into Gaelic as both(an).
History: Robert Booth (1604–72) is mentioned in the colonial records of Exeter, NH, in 1645. He subsequently moved to ME.

variants.name: Boothman
meanings: English (northern): occupational name from Middle English both (Old Danish bōth) ‘temporary shelter, such as a covered market stall or a cattle-herdsman's hut’ + man. In the Pennine uplands of northern England, where booths were subdivisons of vaccaries or cattle-rearing establishment, the name probably denoted a herdsman who looked after cattle, perhaps a man in charge of a vaccary. Elsewhere the surname might have denoted a shopkeeper but evidence for this lacking. Alternatively, the name can also be an occupational name for a servant of a man surnamed Booth .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Booth was born in 1392, in Barton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Boothe of Barton, Esq., was 39 and her mother, Lady Joanna Trafford, was 34. She married Robert De Clifton about 1433, in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 9 September 1470, in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Booth est née en 1392, à Barton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Boothe of Barton, Esq., avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Joanna Trafford, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Robert De Clifton environ 1433, à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 9 septembre 1470, à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Booth 1392 in Barton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Boothe of Barton, Esq. 39 und ihre Mutter Lady Joanna Trafford 34. Sie hat um 1433 in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England Robert De Clifton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 9. September 1470 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Booth è nata il nel 1392 nel Barton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Boothe of Barton, Esq., aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Lady Joanna Trafford, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Robert De Clifton circa 1433, nel Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 settembre 1470, nel Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Boothが1392年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアバートンで生まれた時，父John Boothe of Barton, Esq.は39歳，母Lady Joanna Traffordは34歳であった。約1433年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンでRobert De Cliftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1470年9月9日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンで78歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Booth(이)가 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Boothe of Barton, Esq.(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joanna Trafford(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1433년 영국 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에서 Robert De Clifton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 9월 9일 영국 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Booth nasceu em 1392, em Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Boothe of Barton, Esq., tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joanna Trafford, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert De Clifton aproximadamente 1433, em Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1470, em Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Booth родилась в 1392 г. в местности бартон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Boothe of Barton, Esq. было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joanna Trafford, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert De Clifton около 1433 г. в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 9 сентября 1470 г. в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Booth nació en 1392, en Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Boothe of Barton, Esq., tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lady Joanna Trafford, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Robert De Clifton aproximadamente 1433, en Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1470, en Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
